description: AI-powered job intelligence — score job fit across 10 dimensions, draft tailored cover letters, and track your application pipeline.
features: AI job fit scoring (A-F grade + radar chart across 10 weighted dimensions)
Streaming cover letter drafting with gpt-4o
Supabase-backed application tracker with status pipeline
Pre-baked candidate profile (Daniel: Head of Product AI/Automation/Integrations)
Editable profile for any user context
Dimension-level AI reasoning with score breakdown
